de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.jml.pretranslation

Class TextualJMLConstruct

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.jml.pretranslation.TextualJMLConstruct
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    TextualJMLClassAxiom, TextualJMLClassInv, TextualJMLDepends, TextualJMLFieldDecl, TextualJMLInitially, TextualJMLLoopSpec, TextualJMLMethodDecl, TextualJMLRepresents, TextualJMLSetStatement, TextualJMLSpecCase

    public abstract class TextualJMLConstruct
extends Object
    Objects of this type represent the various JML specification constructs in textual, unprocessed form.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private Position approxPos 
      protected ImmutableList<String> mods 
      protected String name
      A user-provided identifier to keep an overview over large specification collections
      private String sourceFile

    • Constructor Detail

      • TextualJMLConstruct

    • Method Detail

      • getMods

        public final ImmutableList<String> getMods()

      • getApproxPosition

        public Position getApproxPosition()
        Return the approximate position of this construct. This is usually the position of the specification line parsed first. Implementations can set it using setPosition or addGeneric.

      • getSourceFileName

        public String getSourceFileName()
        Return the source file name where this construct appears.

      • setPosition

        protected void setPosition(PositionedString ps)
        Sets the approximate position of this construct when first called with a valid position. The approximate position can still be changed while it is undefined. Also set source file name if known.

      • addGeneric

        protected void addGeneric(Map<String,ImmutableList<PositionedString>> item,
                          PositionedString ps)
